_instructions: 1. Copy this file to .notion.json (it is gitignored — safe to store your key here)
2. Fill in your Notion integration token and database IDs below
4. Run:  git add docs/data && git push
Get your integration token at: https://www.notion.so/my-integrations
Database IDs are the 32-char hex string in the Notion database URL.
Share each database with your integration: open DB → ... → Connections
